name: Pale Fade
description:
Activate 2 (manipulate)

Pale fade is a white ointment with a sharp, earthy scent. The poison rapidly desiccates flesh, which then crumbles and forms a cloud of pallid dust. If the victim is by this poison, then the dust cloud also conceals other creatures from the victim.

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Drained 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage, drained 1, and concealed (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage, drained 1, and concealed (1 round)
